message: I am the Evolution Scholar of Kranix. Bring me beast relics and I shall evolve them.
I can evolve Shadow Minotaur into Lunar Wyvern.
I can evolve Lunar Wyvern into Infernal Tiger.
I can evolve Ancient Wolf into Thunder Serpent.
I can evolve Thunder Serpent into Arcane Minotaur.
I can evolve Frozen Phoenix into Infernal Tiger.

I can evolve Lunar Serpent into Thunder Minotaur.

Choose a beast evolution.
